'''mazïfthïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yofortierite|yofortierite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yofortierite|yofortierite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| mazïfthïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mæzïfthïfth || mæzïfthïfj || mæzïfthïfsh || mæzïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || mazïfzïfthïfth || mazïfzïfthïfj || mazïfzïfthïfsh || mazïfzïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || mazïfthïfth || mazïfthïfj || mazïfthïfsh || mazïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || mazïffthïffth || mazïffthïffj || mazïffthïffsh || mazïffthïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || mazïfthïfïf || mazïfthïfïf || mazïfthïfïf || mazïfthïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || mazïfthïfth || mazïfthïfj || mazïfthïfsh || mazïfthïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || mazïfthïfïfl || mazïfthïfïfl || mazïfthïfïfl || mazïfthïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || mazïfthïfïfïf || mazïfthïfïfïf || mazïfthïfïfïf || mazïfthïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || mazïfthïfïfn || mazïfthïfïfn || mazïfthïfïfn || mazïfthïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || mazïfthïfïforo || mazïfthïfïforo || mazïfthïfïforo || mazïfthïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
